testcase.name: ethtool_test::ethtool-test.py::file_exists
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/ethtool-test.py suite=ethtool_test phase=case type=file_exists warning=False message=File exists

testcase.name: ethtool_test::ethtool-test.py::python_compiles
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/ethtool-test.py suite=ethtool_test phase=case type=py_compile warning=False message=Python compilation succeeded

testcase.name: ethtool_test::ethtool-test.py::has_main_guard
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/ethtool-test.py suite=ethtool_test phase=case type=main_guard warning=False message=Main guard found

testcase.name: ethtool_test::ethtool-test.py::expected_test_order_keywords_exist
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/ethtool-test.py suite=ethtool_test phase=case type=source_contains_all warning=False message=All patterns matched

testcase.name: ethtool_test::ethtool-test.py::cli_no_ethernet_interfaces_exits_nonzero
testcase.system-out:
file=common/linux_scripts/ethtool-test.py suite=ethtool_test phase=case type=module_cli warning=False message=Module CLI check passed details: Work dir: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/ethtool_test/ethtool-test/5_cli_no_ethernet_interfaces_exits_nonzero Command: python /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/ethtool-test.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/ethtool_test/ethtool-test/5_cli_no_ethernet_interfaces_exits_nonzero/system_config.txt Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT ---

[92mRunning Networking Checks[0m
**************************************************************** [93mWARN: No ethernet interfaces detected via ip linux command, Exiting ...[0m --- STDERR ---

testcase.system-out:

[92mINFO: Default route via eth0 is missing; attempting DHCP restore[0m [93mWARN: No DHCP client found (udhcpc/dhclient). Skipping restore.[0m 1: eth0: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP> mtu 1500
[92mINFO: No IPv6 address found on eth0, skipping IPv6 test[0m
****************************************************************

Interface eth0 Bring up : [92mPASSED[0m ethtool present : [91mNO[0m (ethtool not found; using sysfs) Link detected : [92mPASSED[0m IPv4 address present : [91mFAILED[0m (No IPv4 address) IPv6 address present : [93mSKIPPED[0m (No global IPv6)
Ethtool Compliance : [91mFAILED[0m (Required compliant interfaces = 1, but only 0 passed; failed: eth0)
[91mPlease update 'system_config.txt' with the correct value for total_number_of_network_controllers[0m [92mINFO: Cleaning up... restoring interface states[0m [92mINFO: Cleanup complete.[0m --- STDERR ---
